note: Lane DT-001: bun test (v1.3.14) has several issues with SolidJS: 1) bun resolves solid-js conditional exports to server builds instead of client — requires --conditions=browser flag. 2) bun's JSX transform doesn't respect jsxImportSource from tsconfig.json — defaults to React.createElement regardless. 3) bun's [alias] in bunfig.toml doesn't affect node_modules-internal imports. These limitations make SolidJS component rendering tests significantly harder to set up. The workaround is using solid-js/h hyperscript (h()) directly and importing from dist paths.
